title: Simply Optimized Reloaded
description: An unofficial port of Simply Optimized built to support every major mod loader and stay current with the newest versions of Minecraft.
body:
[![Simply Optimized Reloaded](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23cdea6b9d84239f75cbbc4425ebcb5dbddb094.png)](https://modrinth.com/frog)
---
Simply Optimized Reloaded is a port of [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop). Unlike Simply Optimized which focuses primarily on Fabric, this version extends support to all major mod loaders including Fabric, Quilt, Forge, and NeoForge while keeping up with the latest Minecraft releases.

This allows you to enjoy any mod without the hassle of manually finding and installing performance enhancements. Whether you are playing with tech, magic, or exploration mods, this pack ensures a smoother and lag-free experience. We are dedicated to maintaining this project for the long term, ensuring support for future versions of Minecraft on whichever loader you prefer.

If you have any feedback or run into bugs, please send a friend request to [@noobtrieu](https://discordapp.com/users/701353412360405042).
<details>
<summary>Other notes...</summary>

**I won't port:**
- Versions of Fabric that Simply Optimized already supports.
- Versions that Sodium/Embeddium do not support.

---

**Future Plans:**
- If it gets enough downloads, I will continue updating it to later Minecraft versions and may also include older versions such as 1.19.x, 1.18.x, 1.17.x, and 1.16.x.
- I'll properly do a port of [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) if this gets popular as well.

</details>
